title: Adis Zemen Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Adis Zemen, with a Z-Score of +3.03. Temperatures are extremely high, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Adis Zemen is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.6 GG. 
 The humidity is relatively low, at 27%, and the wind speed is moderate, at 6.2 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, indicating a high number of cooling degree days.
